records.description: Write permission denied — rewrite cwd to writable directory

fix_path.description: Write permission denied — rewrite cwd to writable directory

legacy_v3.description: Write permission denied — rewrite cwd to writable directory

files.content:
from pathlib import Path


def write_status(message: str) -> Path:
    output = Path.cwd() / "status.txt"
    output.write_text(message + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return output

import os
import stat
import tempfile
import unittest
from pathlib import Path

from writer import write_status


class WriterTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_status_can_be_written_from_read_only_cwd(self):
        original_cwd = Path.cwd()
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
            sealed = Path(tmp) / "sealed"
            sealed.mkdir()
            sealed.chmod(stat.S_IREAD | stat.S_IEXEC)
            try:
                os.chdir(sealed)
                write_status("ready")
            finally:
                os.chdir(original_cwd)
                sealed.chmod(stat.S_IREAD | stat.S_IWRITE | stat.S_IEXEC)

reference_fix_files.content:
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import gettempdir


def write_status(message: str) -> Path:
    output = Path(gettempdir()) / "status.txt"
    output.write_text(message + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return output

authored_fixture.fix_rationale: Write generated status output to the system temporary directory instead of assuming the current working directory is writable.

files.content:
import os
import pathlib
import shutil


def _enabled(value):
    return value.lower() in {"1", "true", "yes"}


def install_marker():
    if _enabled(os.environ.get("PIP_USER", "")):
        target = pathlib.Path(".user-site-packages")
        target.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
        marker = target / "pip-marker.txt"
        marker.write_text("installed with --user\n", encoding="utf-8")
        return marker

    target = pathlib.Path(".system-site-packages")
    if target.exists():
        target.chmod(0o755)
        shutil.rmtree(target)
    target.mkdir()
    target.chmod(0o555)
    marker = target / "pip-marker.txt"
    marker.write_text("installed without --user\n", encoding="utf-8")
    return marker

authored_fixture.fix_rationale: Setting PIP_USER makes the install use the writable user site-packages path instead of the protected system site-packages path.

reviewer_record.notes: authored by codex; pre-fix fails+matches regex, post-fix passes
